_comment: Edit these to match the real attribute combinations the CRM team tests. Each preset is a named bundle of Braze attributes. Keys here become Braze custom/reserved attributes verbatim, so they must match your Braze attribute names exactly. These values are PLACEHOLDERS until the CRM team confirms the real schema.

abo-churned-de.description: Abo subscriber in Germany who has not booked in 90+ days.

rent-new-signup.description: Fresh rent customer, just signed up, no booking yet.

abo-active-newsletter-optin.description: Active abo subscriber opted in to the newsletter.
